title: 不堪網路霸凌！《星戰8》亞裔女星清空Instagram

replies.msg:
今年29歲的凱莉瑪麗陳（Kelly Marie Tran）是一名越南裔的美國女星，因為在《星際大戰8：最後的絕地武士》演出蘿絲緹克（Rose Tico）一角而獲得廣大影迷的關注，但隨之而來針對她的種族和性別的網路霸凌，讓她決定清空個人Instagram上的所有貼文。

目前，凱利瑪麗陳的Instagram帳號還在，但是所有貼文都已經被刪掉，只剩下自我介紹欄位的一句：「雖然害怕，但無論如何都要這麼做。」

蘿絲緹克在片中與約翰波耶加（John Boyega）飾演的芬恩（Finn）攜手合作，前往賭場星球尋找能夠幫助抵抗勢力的解碼高手。她是《星際大戰》系列第一個亞裔要角，因此受到亞裔美國人的高度支持，但也有很多看她不順眼的網友，湧進她的個人頁面留下各種污辱言論。

凱莉瑪麗陳不是第一個遇到這種狀況的《星際大戰》演員，2016年，在片中飾演主角芮（Rey）的黛西蕾德莉（Daisy Ridley），在她的個人Instagram上發表支持槍枝管制的言論，因此收到許多網友的批評，最後她刪掉了整個Instagram帳號。

在凱莉瑪麗陳清空她的個人Instagram後，《星際大戰8》的導演雷恩強生（Rian Johnson）在個人推特（Twitter）上發了一則訊息：「在社群網站上，只要一小撮有病的人，就可以在牆上投射出很大的陰影，不過在過去四年裡，我遇到了很多真正的星戰粉絲。我們都有喜歡和討厭的部分，但我們會用幽默、愛與尊重來化解它。我們才是絕大多數，我們做得很開心，而且也做得很好。」

凱莉瑪麗陳於1989年出生於加州聖地牙哥，她的父母都是因為越戰而來到美國的越南難民，從加州大學洛杉磯分校取得傳播學士學位後，在洛杉磯展開演員生涯，陸續參與秀場、電視劇和電影演出，直到2017年《星際大戰8》讓她全球爆紅。

Star Wars' Kelly Marie Tran DELETES all her Instagram posts after 'months of harassment'


Star Wars: The Last Jedi's Kelly Marie Tran - who played Resistance maintenance worker Rose Tico - reportedly wiped her only social media, Instagram, clean this week due to months of online bullying


Racism and sexism: The news broke Monday after the semi-official Star Wars Facts account tweeted that the Vietnamese-American 29-year-old 'deleted all the posts due to months of harassment'


The Last Jedi director Rian Johnson tweeted in response on Tuesday: 'What we talk about when we talk about manbabies...a few unhealthy people can cast a big shadow on the wall'


For example, vandals edited her character's Star Wars Wookie-pedia page to read: 'Ching Chong Wing Tong is a dumba** f***ing character Disney made and is a stupid, retarded, and autistic love interest for Finn. She better die in the coma because she is a dumba** b****'


Before/after: Kelly had been lauded over her candid, relateable posts such as comparing herself before and after the polish of glam squads and retouching in magazine spreads


Tran wrote in an October 15 post: 'Guys, can I tell you a secret? I avoided social media for a long time purely because I was afraid. I was terrified of being picked apart, of being scrutinized, of being seen'


'I'm super sensitive!' The UCLA grad followed the lead of her castmate Daisy Ridley, who deleted the popular platform in July of last year because she wasn't 'equipped' (pictured December 9)


'That's how we're gonna win, not fighting what we hate, but saving what we love': The SoCal native made history as the first woman of color to hold a major onscreen role in the Star Wars franchise and Rose prevented 'Resistance hero' Finn (John Boyega) from martyring himself
